final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(omrade) AS wkt
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
WITH k AS (
  SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, 25833) AS geom
  FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
  WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, ST_SRID(s.omrade)) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'))
)
SELECT ST_AsText(ST_Union(geom)) AS union_wkt FROM k;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 is planned to query database 'stormflohavniva', not 'kommuner'. Use the planned database for this step or produce a new plan with different step numbers.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality bbox and SRID

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons within the municipality bbox

3.description: get 1km grid cells within the municipality bbox

4.description: find grid cells that intersect the 200-year storm-surge polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids that intersect the storm-surge polygons

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

args.sql:
WITH km_bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833) AS geom
)
SELECT s.omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
JOIN km_bbox b ON ST_Intersects(s.omrade, b.geom)
LIMIT 100;

FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
JOIN km_bbox b ON ST_Intersects(s.omrade, b.geom);

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_SRID(omrade);

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geom, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade AS geom FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);
